items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler is ready for the challenge. 👀🏀 @FanDuel The No. 5 overall pick and newest Los Angeles Clippers rookie shares why he can't wait to face NBA superstar Kevin Durant and compete against one of the greatest scorers in basketball history. Can Wagler make an immediate…
